summary: The only AI tool designed specifically for resume writing Discussion | Link
content: Paste your resume and a job posting — ResumeWriting.com tailors your resume to that specific role in under a minute, so you apply with a sharper, role-matched resume. Built by the team behind ResumeWriters.com, human resume experts since 1999.
chineseSummary: 唯一一款专为简历撰写而设计的人工智能工具关联
chineseContent: 粘贴您的简历和职位发布 — ResumeWriting.com 可在一分钟内根据特定职位定制您的简历，以便您可以使用更清晰、与职位匹配的简历进行申请。由 ResumeWriters.com 背后的团队创建，他们是自 1999 年以来的人类简历专家。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
